#### What does this PR do?
- Renamed the source filter keyword to All Sources in View Tags page

- Pre-selected All Sources filter in View Tags page

- Fixed failing API call when All Sources is selected

- Properly aligned the search input and filterby inputs in View Tags page

- Updated Add Entites label to Update Entites in edit Tag page

- Left-aligned the Save changes anf Update Entites button in Edit Tag page

#### Description of Task to be completed?
- This task is a follow-back feed for the items listed above

#### How should this be manually tested?
- Clone the repository

- checkout to `FRONT-1128B`

- run `yarn` to install all required dependencies

- run `yarn run start` to start the server

- go to [tag-management on your localhost](http://localhost:4200/tag-management).

#### Any background context you want to provide?
-  [User should be able to manage the tags](https://152tech.atlassian.net/browse/FRONT-1128).
